entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Penuisetum glaucum( L.) R. Br., the crop studied for nitrogen use efficiency

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A limiting factor in pearl millet production

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Total above ground biomass per unit of N absorbed

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC NITROGEN EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Instantaneous measurement of N efficiency calculated as tmol CO2 g-1 N s-1

entities.name: NUTRIENT SOLUTION CULTURE
entities.description: Experimental setup used to compare genotypes' responses to N supply

entities.name: NITROGEN LEVELS
entities.description: Four levels of N supply containing 60, 120, 180, and 240 mg N plant-1

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: Leaf area per unit mass (cm2 g-1) calculated from growth analysis

entities.name: GROWTH ANALYSIS
entities.description: Method used to calculate specific leaf area

entities.name: LEAF CO2 EXCHANGE RATE
entities.description: The rate of CO2 exchange measured on fully expanded leaves

entities.name: LEAF NITROGEN CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of nitrogen in the leaves used to derive photosynthetic N efficiency

entities.name: LEAF THICKNESS
entities.description: Physical attribute of leaves where N-efficient genotypes maintained thicker leaves

entities.name: NITROGEN RESOURCE PARTITIONING
entities.description: The allocation of available N resources into additional leaf area
